title: Define Parameter
text: Define Parameter Define or edit a parameter definition for the current operation. A parameter can be a field, component variable, named parameter, an entity (for example, the model entity painted on the component), or an occurrence parameter. The Details section shows the specification details for the parameter. The Details of Implementation section enables you provide implementation-specific information for the parameter. Use the New and Delete buttons to add or remove parameters from the list. Use the Up and Down buttons to change the order of parameters in the list. The parameters for an operation are read from first to last.
